authors.author: Spiritual
Spiritual
Ich bin ja nur ein Gast auf Erden

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am a poor wayfaring stranger I'm travellin' through this world of woe Yet there's no sickness, toil, nor danger In that bright land to which I go

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm going there to see my Father I'm going there, no more to roam I'm only going over Jordan I'm only going over home

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I know dark clouds will gather'round me I know my way is rough and steep But golden fields lie just before me Where God's redeemed shall ever sleep

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’m going home to see my mother And all my loved ones who've gone on I'm only going over Jordan I'm only going over home

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'll soon be free from every trial My body sleep in the churchyard I'll drop the cross of self-denial And enter on my great reward

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I'm going there to see my Savior To sing His praise forevermore I'm only going over Jordan I'm only going over home
